name: Korean game product review
summary: Reviews Korean game account, store, probability, HUD density, and accessibility flows without treating static source as regulatory proof.

criteria.title: Declare game account password intent
criteria.question: Can password managers distinguish sign-in credentials from password creation?
criteria.evidence: Inspect password inputs for current-password or new-password autocomplete tokens.
verification: Exercise launcher or web sign-in, signup, and password reset with a platform password manager.
falsePositiveNotes: Platform-native or passwordless authentication without web password inputs is outside this rule.

criteria.title: Keep game promotions opt-in
criteria.question: Are promotional messages separate from account and gameplay terms and off by default?
criteria.evidence: Inspect checked checkboxes whose associated label mentions marketing, advertising, or promotional messages.
verification: Open account creation in a fresh session and confirm promotional consent is separate and unchecked.
falsePositiveNotes: Do not treat a returning player's saved communication preference as a new opt-in default.

criteria.title: Expose item probabilities before purchase
criteria.question: Can players reach current probability disclosures before committing currency, and do the disclosed items match the purchase pool?
criteria.evidence: Capture the store entry, probability disclosure, purchase confirmation, and effective-date or version context.
verification: Compare every purchasable random-item pool with its visible disclosure and localized labels.
falsePositiveNotes: The presence of the word 확률 alone does not prove that values are current, complete, or tied to the selected pool.

criteria.title: Keep dense Korean HUD information readable
criteria.question: Do Korean labels, combat feedback, cooldowns, currency, and alerts remain legible without covering critical play space?
criteria.evidence: Capture representative combat, menu, store, and notification states at both declared viewports and supported aspect ratios.
verification: Check text scaling, safe areas, color-independent status, input mode, focus, and longest localized strings.
falsePositiveNotes: High information density can be genre-appropriate when priority, customization, and accessibility settings remain clear.

criteria.title: Prove account, menu, and store access
criteria.question: Can players with visual, hearing, motor, and cognitive needs complete account, menu, purchase, and recovery flows?
criteria.evidence: Attach remapping, subtitle, color, focus, screen-reader or narration, motion, and error-recovery evidence appropriate to the platform.
verification: Run the approved platform and browser verification profiles across supported input modes.
falsePositiveNotes: Web accessibility evidence does not prove in-engine menu, controller, subtitle, or HUD accessibility.
The fixture intentionally omits password autocomplete and preselects marketing consent; compliant account forms must not emit those confirmed findings.

notes: The pack reviews supplied evidence only. It does not certify regulatory compliance, launch a game client, or perform purchases.
